_meta.description: Table-heavy comparison document with pricing and benchmarks

questions.question: Which LLM provider has the largest context window?
questions.expected_answer: Google DeepMind's Gemini 2.5 Pro with 2,000,000 tokens
questions.notes: Direct — Gemini 2.5 Pro has the largest context at 2M tokens

questions.question: If I want the cheapest LLM API for a high-volume application, which model should I choose?
questions.expected_answer: Gemini 2.5 Flash at $0.15/MTok input and $0.60/MTok output, or DeepSeek-V3 at $0.27/$1.10
questions.notes: Paraphrase — needs to compare pricing table and find the cheapest

questions.question: Which models support both batch API and prompt caching?
questions.expected_answer: Claude 4.6, GPT-5.4, and Gemini 2.5 all support prompt caching, but only Claude 4.6 and GPT-5.4 support batch API
questions.notes: Cross-section — needs to check two rows in the feature matrix

questions.question: Does the report include pricing information for Cohere's Command-R model?
questions.expected_answer: No, the report does not include Cohere or Command-R. It covers Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, Mistral, xAI, Alibaba (Qwen), and DeepSeek.
questions.notes: Negative — Cohere is not in the report at all

questions.question: What is Claude Opus 4.6's score on SWE-bench Verified?
questions.notes: Number verify — exact benchmark score from the table
